name: Shrimp Sauce with Spaghetti
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the garlic in oil.
2. Add tomatoes, salt, and basil to the pan. Simmer uncovered for 30 minutes.
3. Stir in the tomato paste and oregano. Continue simmering for an additional 15 minutes.
4. Stir in the shrimp, garlic salt, and horseradish. Heat until the shrimp are cooked through.
5. Serve over hot spaghetti and sprinkle with grated cheese. Yields: 4 servings.
